title: Outline Ores
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h5H0dwvU/images/69507dd87df063f7c859904bc7c07e794d8c83da.png)
## 🔍 Outline Ores – Spot Ores Instantly!
This pack adds bright, colored outlines to all vanilla ores, making them easy to see in caves or while mining. Perfect for PvP, Survival, or Speedrunning. Stay sharp underground with Outline Ores!
## 🤔 Features
- Clear outlines for Diamond, Iron, Redstone, etc.
- 16x resolution – FPS-friendly
- Works with Minecraft 1.21 - 1.21.4
- Compatible with most packs & OptiFine
## 🤝 Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful Discord.
### Thanks
Big thanks to [Alexander499](https://modrinth.com/user/Alexander499) for the help.
